channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Moonshot AI releases 2.8T parameter model Kimi K3
item.description: The model features Delta Attention for 6.3x faster decoding.
item.content:encoded:
The model features Delta Attention for 6.3x faster decoding.

Original source: http://Kimi.com

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/85c3nzuo

  • Views: 10,612,146
  • Likes: 101,867
  • Bookmarks: 14,595
  • Quotes: 1,134
  • Replies: 4,125
  • Posts: 261

Top authors

  • Nando de Freitas
  • roon
  • Nathan Lambert
  • Aravind Srinivas
  • Logan Kilpatrick

item.title: Moonshot AI releases 2.8T multimodal Kimi K3 model
item.description: It delivers 6.3x decoding speedups at million-token lengths.
item.content:encoded:
It delivers 6.3x decoding speedups at million-token lengths.

Original source: https://curiouscats.ai/breaking-news/chinas-moonshot-unveils-kimi-k3-the-worlds-largest?source=reporter

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/8nb69hcc

  • Views: 422,834
  • Likes: 4,694
  • Bookmarks: 688
  • Quotes: 31
  • Replies: 83
  • Posts: 36

Top authors

  • Russ Salakhutdinov
  • Soumith Chintala
  • Graham Neubig
  • clem 🤗
  • Bill Gurley

item.title: X uses Grok to purge 4,000 engagement-farming accounts
item.description: Duplicate post revenue now redirects back to original creators.
item.content:encoded:
Duplicate post revenue now redirects back to original creators.

Original source: https://x.com/nikitabier/status/2077774853650944028

item.title: Thinking Machines releases Inkling, a 975B parameter open multimodal model
item.description: Early benchmarks show high refusal rates on controversial prompt evaluations.
item.content:encoded:
Early benchmarks show high refusal rates on controversial prompt evaluations.

Original source: https://thinkingmachines.ai/news/introducing-inkling/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/hrt6ltes

  • Views: 275,914
  • Likes: 2,894

item.title: Sunday Robotics releases ACT-2 Preview with 99% zero-shot success
item.description: The humanoid robot model learned domestic laundry tasks from single examples.
item.content:encoded:
The humanoid robot model learned domestic laundry tasks from single examples.

Original source: https://www.sunday.ai/blog/act-2-preview

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gbbrru54

item.title: SpaceX aborts thirteenth Starship flight test at last minute
item.description: The launch would have been the second using v3 hardware.
item.content:encoded:
The launch would have been the second using v3 hardware.

Original source: https://x.com/OXGrokula

item.title: Debate questions China's strategic policy on open-sourcing Kimi models
item.description: Commentators point out that Moonshot AI's K3 model remains closed-source
item.content:encoded:
Commentators point out that Moonshot AI's K3 model remains closed-source

item.title: Haven Feng releases schema agent harness for abstract reasoning
item.description: The system scored 99% on the ARC-AGI-3 public benchmark.
item.content:encoded:
The system scored 99% on the ARC-AGI-3 public benchmark.

Original source: https://x.com/HavenFeng/status/2077770348876247502

item.title: Linus Torvalds rejects anti-AI policies in Linux kernel development
item.description: Torvalds argued developers opposing AI tools can fork the codebase.
item.content:encoded:
Torvalds argued developers opposing AI tools can fork the codebase.

Original source: https://www.pcgamer.com/software/ai/its-not-like-natural-intelligence-is-always-all-that-great-either-linus-torvalds-addresses-anti-ai-sentiment-in-linux-development

item.title: Xi Jinping proposes open-source framework to challenge US AI governance
item.description: China will train 5,000 global researchers to counter Western export controls.
item.content:encoded:
China will train 5,000 global researchers to counter Western export controls.

Original source: https://scmp.com/tech/policy/article/3360858/chinas-xi-jinping-addresses-world-ai-conference-us-tech-rivalry-heats
